large_tent.title: Upgrade to a Simply Tents large tent — the maximum camp size for extended expeditions

camp_outpost.title: Establish a tent outpost near a dungeon or far-away location — create a forward base

subtitle.text: The kingdom does not stop at your walls. It goes as far as you can reliably return from.

description: The large tent expands the portable camp system significantly.
It takes longer to set up but provides more protection and storage.
A forward base outpost near Ch16's Celestisynth gathering zones
Celestisynth materials may require specific dimension or biome access.
Setting up a tent outpost near those zones is efficient logistics.
Simply Tents works well with the Via Romana road system from Ch12:
Road → Outpost tent → Gather → Return along road.
This is the infrastructure the kingdom runs on.
The people of Ch12 are using these roads and tents.
The army from Ch12 might be maintaining them.
→ Upgrade to a large Simply Tent [check]
